title: After the Afterparty

writers.lyricist: Charli xcx/Tor Erik Hermansen/RAYE/Lil Yachty/Mikkel Eriksen/Eyelar/Fred Gibson
writers.composer: Charli xcx/Tor Erik Hermansen/RAYE/Lil Yachty/Mikkel Eriksen/Eyelar/Fred Gibson

lyrics.text: After the afterparty we're gonna keep it going
lyrics.translation: 即使派对过后 我们也要继续狂欢

lyrics.text: We're gonna rip it up, the neighbours might complain
lyrics.translation: 撕碎所有规则 即使邻里将要抱怨

lyrics.text: I think it's almost 4am but baby I'm still feeling just fine
lyrics.translation: 我想现在大概凌晨四点了 但我感觉才刚刚好

lyrics.text: Ice all up in a plastic cup but I'ma keep on sipping all night, yeah
lyrics.translation: 塑料杯冰镇美酒都满上 我还要继续喝一晚上

lyrics.text: I might' ve kissed a thousand lips but maybe that's just all in my mind
lyrics.translation: 我可能已经和无数个人接过吻 但也可能只是我喝高的幻觉

lyrics.text: Some people never understand the way we live but we're living life
lyrics.translation: 有些人可能永远都不会理解我们 但这就是我们的生活方式

lyrics.text: Uh huh, hey, uh huh, Monday to Sunday, it's never too late
lyrics.translation: 周一到周日 派对永远不算迟

lyrics.text: So everyone say, "We don't wanna stop!"
lyrics.translation: 所有人一起大喊 “我们永远不要停下”

lyrics.text: Cause after the afterparty, we're gonna keep it goin'
lyrics.translation: 因为即使派对过后 我们也要继续狂欢

lyrics.text: We're gonna rip it up, the neighbours might complain
lyrics.translation: 撕碎所有规则 即使邻里将要抱怨

lyrics.text: Cause after the afterparty, we're gonna stay 'til mornin'
lyrics.translation: 因为即使派对过后 我们也要轰趴到天明

lyrics.text: Then when the time is up, we'll do it all again
lyrics.translation: 如果这场派对结束 我们就再来一场

lyrics.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
We're all in love
lyrics.translation: 我们都沉浸于爱

lyrics.text: We're all in love
lyrics.translation: 我们都沉浸于爱

lyrics.text: I'm hangin' on my best friend's couch and my clothes are all on the floor
lyrics.translation: 我和最好的朋友躺在沙发上 衣服在地板上凌乱不堪

lyrics.text: I got glitter in my underwear like it was Studio 54, yeah
lyrics.translation: 我就像54号夜总会里的人一样 把亮片塞满了内衣

lyrics.text: I can't remember why I love it, but I need it baby, clap, bring on the encore
lyrics.translation: 不知道为什么我竟然喜欢这样 但我就需要这样 鼓掌吧 就像演唱会安可那样

lyrics.text: Let's pour another drink, the glasses go *clink*
lyrics.translation: 让我们再满上一杯酒 让玻璃杯锵锵作响

lyrics.text: Yeah, we're always up for one more
lyrics.translation: 我们总是已经为下一杯酒做好了准备

lyrics.text: Uh huh, hey, uh huh, Monday to Sunday, it's never too late
lyrics.translation: 周一到周日 派对永远不算迟

lyrics.text: So everyone say, "We don't wanna stop!"
lyrics.translation: 所有人一起大喊 “我们永远不要停下”

lyrics.text: Cause after the afterparty, we're gonna keep it goin'
lyrics.translation: 因为即使派对过后 我们也要继续狂欢

lyrics.text: We're gonna rip it up, the neighbors might complain
lyrics.translation: 撕碎所有规则 即使邻里将要抱怨

lyrics.text: Cause after the afterparty, afterparty
lyrics.translation: 因为即使派对过后

lyrics.text: We're gonna stay 'til mornin', stay 'til mornin'
lyrics.translation: 我们也要轰趴到天亮

lyrics.text: Then when the time is up, we'll do it again, oh yeah
lyrics.translation: 如果这场派对结束 我们就再来一场

lyrics.text: The party just ended but I'm not done with you
lyrics.translation: 派对结束 但我和你还没完

lyrics.text: My folks are out of town, we got a crib with a view
lyrics.translation: 我的兄弟都在城外 个个豪宅美景

lyrics.text: Come over, bring a couple friends, I keep mine with me
lyrics.translation: 带上几个你的朋友一起造访 我也会带上我的哥们

lyrics.text: Shout out to Whitney, she was so wicked
lyrics.translation: 大声朝Whitney喊 她可真是调皮

lyrics.text: The party was so crazy, the party was so crazy
lyrics.translation: 这派对太疯狂了 这派对太疯狂了

lyrics.text: Tomorrow I'll be lazy but I'll spend it with you baby
lyrics.translation: 也许明天我就会懒得不想动 但今夜我要和我的宝贝共度

lyrics.text: Monday to Sunday doing it our way
lyrics.translation: 周一到周日 我们我行我素

lyrics.text: RiRi on replay, cheers to the weekday
lyrics.translation: 放着日日的歌 敬工作日一杯

lyrics.text: We're all in, we're all in love, yeah
lyrics.translation: 我们都 我们都沉浸于爱

lyrics.text: Drop, drop, drop, drop, drop
And we do it like ice cream for dinner
lyrics.translation: 派对就像晚餐后的冰淇淋甜点

lyrics.text: Bucket of liqueur, we're getting sicker
lyrics.translation: 喝酒的冰桶 上面被我们贴满了贴纸

lyrics.text: Don't need Ibiza
lyrics.translation: 不需要Ibiza乐助兴

lyrics.text: We're all in, we're all in love, yeah
lyrics.translation: 我们都 我们都沉浸于爱

lyrics.text: Drop, drop, drop, drop, drop
And we do it like
lyrics.translation: 我们的狂欢

lyrics.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
We're all in love, we're all in love, yeah
